note: Advisory sandbox detector. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED verdicts, never PASS. Read-only over the workflow-census extensions registry; the tool itself is the trust spine.
title: Dead-Motor Detector (static, read-only, receipt_glob vs on-disk receipts)

files: receipts/ (+ decision_language_machine_v1/receipts/ — wherever a receipt_glob points; resolved relative to repo root)
subject.note: for each census motor's receipt_glob, globs the repo root and counts matching receipts; a glob with ZERO matches is a dead motor. Census + receipt dirs read-only, sha unchanged.

finding.interpretation: 4 of 6 census motors declare a receipt_glob that matches ZERO on-disk receipts. Their globs are prose descriptors ('receipt via Telegram', 'gateway_leads insert receipt', ...) rather than resolvable paths, so no on-disk receipt evidence exists for those motors — they are dead by the on-disk-receipt invariant. The 2 motors whose receipt_glob is a genuine path pattern DO match receipts and are not flagged. REPORTED as a finding, not relaxed away.

what_it_proves: REAL census -> CHECK_REJECTED citing 4 dead motors whose receipt_glob matches zero on-disk receipts (loops declare a receipt location but deposited nothing there)
POSITIVE CONTROL: the 2 real motors with genuine path globs (agent-read-staleness x6, auth-surface-probe x1) DO match receipts and are never flagged — a zero-hit cannot be a broken-glob false-clean
a MINIMAL MUTATION of the real census (repoint each dead motor's receipt_glob at a genuinely-matching pattern) is all-alive -> CHECK_OK — the detector is not always-fail
seeding one fake motor with a nothing-matching glob (SEEDED-PHANTOM-MOTOR) into the clean copy flips it back -> CHECK_REJECTED, seed loop_id cited (RED-before-GREEN)
removing the fix from one real motor (glob back to prose) re-rejects — invariant is never relaxed to admit a receipt-less motor
running the detector leaves the census and receipts/ tree byte-identical (sha unchanged); tool is strictly read-only
verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS; exits NONZERO on any dead motor (not always-exit-0)
chess_patches_applied: runs against the REAL census and records CHECK_REJECTED with the 4 real dead motors (no strawman; real receipt_glob values globbed as-is)
positive control proves the glob engine actually matches (2 alive motors), so a clean verdict can't be a broken-regex false-clean
positive proof is a minimally-mutated census that legitimately revives; no invariant relaxation
reads the census + receipt dirs, never writes to either (Lock 5 / read-only)
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; reports the dead motors as a finding, never its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 1/2/5/6/7 append-only (census + receipts/ unmodified, sha unchanged; no tracked file edited/overwritten)
no live call (no network, Supabase, sends, deploy; HOME untouched)
worktree not pushed (no git write commands)
exit_gate_B3: MO-2 done (static detector surfaces 4 real dead motors by finding; RED-before-GREEN via seeded phantom motor + minimal-mutation revive positive; positive-control live globs prove the glob engine isn't false-clean).
next_action: Escalate the 4 dead-motor finding: either those motors must land a real on-disk receipt matching a resolvable receipt_glob, or the census must record their receipt channel (Telegram/Supabase) as non-file so the detector can exempt them explicitly.
